achievements.title: Inter-House Sports Championship
achievements.description: First place in the annual Section C inter-house sports tournament.

achievements.title: Science Olympiad — First Place
achievements.description: House team secured the top position in the inter-house Science Olympiad.

achievements.title: Cultural Festival — Overall Trophy
achievements.description: Awarded for outstanding collective performance across music and dance.

achievements.title: Academic Excellence Shield
achievements.description: Highest cumulative academic performance across all streams in Term II.

achievements.title: House Council Leadership Award
achievements.description: Recognised for exemplary organisation of house assemblies and student initiatives.

achievements.title: Community Service Commendation
achievements.description: Outstanding contribution to the school outreach and service programme.

achievements.title: Centenary Inter-School Cricket Cup
achievements.description: Victory in the centenary edition of the inter-school cricket championship.

achievements.title: Founder's Day Academic Shield
achievements.description: Perennial recognition for sustained academic distinction on Founder's Day.

achievements.title: National Science Olympiad — Gold Medal
achievements.description: Gold medal in the national physics round representing the school.

achievements.title: Regional Debate Championship
achievements.description: Regional champion in the parliamentary debate category.

achievements.title: All-India Literary Prize
achievements.description: Best short story in the all-India schools literary competition.

achievements.title: State Badminton Selection
achievements.description: Selected to represent the district at the state-level tournament.

achievements.title: National Youth Art Exhibition
achievements.description: Work featured in the national youth art exhibition catalogue.

achievements.title: House Prefect Commendation
achievements.description: Commended by the House Master for service as Ashoka House Council President.
